title: Total Compensation Suite
description: Model total compensation across base, bonus, equity, and benefits for up to four offers or scenarios.

title: Credential ROI Suite
description: Calculate the NPV and payback period of professional certifications against career earnings uplift.

title: Human Capital Engine
description: Quantify lifetime economic value of human capital across education, career path, and retirement scenarios.

title: Geo-Fiscal Arbitrage Simulator
description: Model income equivalency and net financial impact of relocating across 70 metros with state tax and cost-of-living adjustment.

title: Education Savings Projector
description: Project 529 growth, state tax deductions, and college cost coverage across contribution and market scenarios.

title: Career Resilience Engine
description: Score automation-displacement risk by occupation and model the ROI of upskilling or reskilling investments.

title: Workforce Board ROI Report Generator
description: Generate a WIOA-aligned ROI report for workforce development programs using credential and earnings outcome data.

title: Career Transition Suite
description: Model the financial cost and break-even timeline of switching careers or industries.

title: Visa Strategy Navigator
description: Map US visa pathways and historical approval rates for your occupation, nationality, and career timeline.

title: Professional License Reciprocity Checker
description: Check reciprocity and endorsement pathways for licensed professions across all 50 states.

title: Apprenticeship & Earn-and-Learn Matcher
description: Identify apprenticeship programs by occupation and state with wage progression and credential outcome data.

title: Scholarship ROI Tracker
description: Calculate net ROI of scholarship applications by award value, time invested, and estimated win probability.

title: Student Loan Repayment Optimizer
description: Compare federal repayment plans—IDR, PSLF, standard—by monthly payment, total cost, and forgiveness outcome.

title: FAFSA SAI Simulator
description: Estimate your Student Aid Index from income, assets, and household data under current FAFSA methodology.

title: CPD / CPE Credit Tracker
description: Track continuing education credits against license renewal requirements by jurisdiction and credential type.

title: Exam Cost & Timeline Planner
description: Model total cost and study timeline for 32 professional exams including fees, prep costs, and retake probability.

title: Freelance / 1099 Total Cost Calculator
description: Convert 1099 freelance rates to W-2 equivalents accounting for SE tax, benefits, and overhead costs.

title: Benefits Open Enrollment Optimizer
description: Compare health, HSA, FSA, and ancillary benefit elections by total annual cost and tax savings.

title: Separation Package Analyzer
description: Evaluate severance packages by cash value, COBRA cost, non-compete terms, and negotiation leverage.

title: Offer Negotiation Suite
description: Model multi-variable offer negotiations with counteroffer impact on total 3-year compensation.

title: Graduate School ROI Comparator
description: Compare graduate programs by tuition, opportunity cost, earnings uplift, and NPV break-even timeline.

title: Job Search ROI Tracker
description: Track job search channels by application volume, conversion rates, and time-to-offer ROI.

title: Career Break & Reentry Cost Engine
description: Quantify the total financial cost of a career gap including forgone income, benefit loss, and reentry timeline.

title: MBA Program Fit & ROI Ranker
description: Compare up to 4 MBA programs by COA, opportunity cost, post-MBA salary by specialization, payback, and NPV. 40+ programs. AP2 inbound from AL-26; outbound to AL-30.

title: Test Prep Investment Analyzer
description: ROI of test prep for GMAT/GRE/TOEFL/IELTS/LSAT/MCAT. Score gap + prep cost vs. admissions tier shift and scholarship lift. 2-tab tool.

title: International Student Cost Modeler
description: F-1 visa costs, OPT/STEM OPT earnings window, H-1B rates FY2020-24, non-US program comparison. 2-tab tool. Legal disclaimer required.

title: Parent College ROI Planner
description: 529 projection, SAI/EFC asset impact, COA by school tier, loan vs. gift split. AP2 inbound from AL-17. 2-tab tool.

title: Equity Compensation Analyzer
description: RSU vesting (cliff + graded), ISO/NSO intrinsic value, AMT flag, equity vs. cash equivalence, 3-offer total comp NPV stack. 2-tab. Legal disclaimer required.

title: AI Skills Premium Calculator
description: Calculate salary premium and NPV of AI skill acquisition by role, tool set, and labor market.

title: Federal vs. Private Sector Comp Comparator
description: Compare federal GS/SES compensation to private-sector equivalents including FERS pension and full benefits.

title: Trade vs. Degree ROI Engine
description: Model the NPV of trade apprenticeship versus four-year degree pathways by occupation and state.

title: Remote Work Tax Mapper
description: Identify state tax obligations, reciprocity agreements, and nexus risk for remote and hybrid workers.

title: Non-Compete Risk & Enforceability Screener
description: Screen non-compete clauses for enforceability risk by state law, role, and compensation threshold.

title: Professional Degree ROI Ranker
description: Rank MD, JD, MBA, and other professional degrees by tuition, opportunity cost, and lifetime earnings NPV.

title: Military-to-Civilian Salary Bridge
description: Convert military compensation (BAH, BAS, VA benefits) to civilian equivalent salary for job comparisons.

title: Workforce Pell Eligibility Screener
description: Estimates Workforce Pell Grant award for short-term credential programs (150-599 clock hours, 8-14 weeks) under OBBBA P.L. 119-21 (effective July 1, 2026). Inputs: AGI or SAI, family size, dependency status, clock hours, weeks, occupation category. Outputs: estimated SAI, base Pell eligibility, proration ratio, award, lifetime usage note.

title: Workforce Pell Credential Value Ranker
description: Ranks 21 Workforce Pell-eligible short-term credentials by ROI, wage gain, demand, and Pell coverage. Embeds BLS OEWS May 2023 wages and BLS OOH 2024-34 projections. Personalized to user SAI.

title: Early Career Net Worth Trajectory Engine
description: 10-year net worth projection for early-career individuals. Three savings scenarios (±10pp). Embedded 2026 tax brackets, 401k match, student debt paydown, SVG chart. Zero maintenance.

title: Signing Bonus Clawback Analyzer
description: Models true net cost of signing bonus clawback. Four repayment scenarios including IRC §1341 credit. Pro-rated obligation timeline. Zero maintenance.

title: Part-Time / Gig Income Optimizer
description: For hybrid W-2+1099 workers. Marginal effective rate on gig income (income tax + SE tax net of §164(f)), quarterly estimated payments, safe harbor, net hourly analysis.

title: Certification Renewal Cost Forecaster
description: 6-year renewal cash-flow planner for up to 6 professional certifications. 19 embedded credentials. Collision detection, study hours, CEU tracking.

title: ISA vs. Student Loan Comparator
description: Compares ISA vs. student loan total repayment and NPV under a user income trajectory. Break-even income, year-by-year cash flow. Zero external data.

title: Dual Enrollment ROI Calculator
description: Quantifies tuition arbitrage, semester compression, and early workforce earnings NPV from dual enrollment. Pure math on user inputs — no embedded data.

title: Deferred Comp 457(b) Decision Engine
description: Models after-tax value of 457(b) deferral vs. taxable account across current and retirement marginal rates, growth horizon, and LTCG rate. Computes break-even retirement rate, NPV advantage, and annual withdrawal comparison.

title: Tutor ROI Calculator
description: Models expected value of tutoring investment: probability of score improvement × (merit scholarship NPV + admission value uplift) vs. tutor cost. Returns net ROI, break-even probability, and gross value.

title: Test Retake Decision Engine
description: EV model for retake vs. apply-now on GRE/GMAT/LSAT/MCAT/SAT/ACT. Returns expected value of each path, EV advantage, break-even probability of improvement, and cycle delay cost.

title: MBA Application Portfolio Optimizer
description: Expected-value optimizer for MBA application school list. Models P(≥1 offer), expected scholarship, portfolio EV, and marginal value per additional school by tier.

title: Tuition Reimbursement True Value Calculator
description: Models true net value of employer tuition benefit: IRS §127 tax savings, clawback risk, study-time opportunity cost, credential lift. CA AB 692 flag.

title: PhD vs. Industry Pivot Calculator
description: NPV model for finishing a PhD vs. leaving for industry. Computes opportunity cost, break-even year, PSLF impact, and year-by-year cumulative earnings.

title: Law School ROI by Career Track
description: 10-yr NPV for BigLaw, In-House, Government, and Public Interest tracks. Models PSLF forgiveness, IDR vs. standard repayment, and break-even year.

title: GMAT vs. GRE Strategic Choice Engine
description: Profile-based scoring engine recommending GMAT vs. GRE. Scores 7 dimensions, produces target score tables by tier, all-in cost comparison, and prep estimate.

title: Executive MBA vs. Full-Time MBA Decision Engine
description: 10-yr NPV of EMBA vs. FT MBA vs. No MBA. Models employer sponsorship, 2-yr salary gap, career pivot feasibility, and break-even year.

title: STEM OPT Financial Runway Planner
description: Financial runway model for F-1 students on OPT/STEM OPT. H-1B lottery probability, savings milestones, worst-case balance, EB-2 NIW path, cap-exempt strategy.

title: TOEFL vs. IELTS vs. Duolingo Choice Engine
description: Profile-based scoring engine recommending TOEFL, IELTS, or Duolingo for international MBA and graduate applicants. Scores 8 profile dimensions, produces target score tables by program tier, all-in cost comparison, and 2026 school acceptance policy notes including Wharton's new Duolingo acceptance.

title: LSAT Score → Law School Tier Match & Financial Planner
description: Maps LSAT score and GPA to realistic law school tier access (T14/T15–50/Regional) with financial outcomes: expected debt, 10-year NPV by career track, scholarship probability, PSLF forgiveness, and points-to-next-tier analysis.

title: MBA Scholarship Strategy Engine
description: Two-stage scholarship strategy engine: (1) Round Timing Optimizer — dollar EV of applying R1 vs. R2 vs. R3 given application readiness, admit-rate edge, and merit budget depletion; (2) Offer Negotiation EV — probability-weighted value of countering with a competing offer, by school type.

title: MBA Admissions Consulting ROI Calculator
description: Expected-value model for admissions consulting: converts claimed admission-probability uplift into dollar EV using tier salary premium NPVs, computes break-even uplift for the fee, and runs sensitivity across 2–15pp real uplift.

title: MBA Yield Decision Engine
description: Weighted multi-criteria decision engine for choosing among 2–3 MBA admission offers: tier salary outcomes, net cost, career goal fit, network strength, cost of living — with sensitivity analysis across five priority profiles.

title: Dual Degree ROI Calculator
description: Three-path NPV model for JD/MBA, MD/MBA, MPH/MBA, MPP/MBA decisions: primary degree only vs. concurrent dual vs. sequential. Computes dual marginal cost, cross-domain salary premium, break-even year, and concurrency savings.

title: Online MBA vs. EMBA vs. Full-Time MBA 4-Path Comparator
description: Four-path NPV and goal-fit comparator: Online MBA, EMBA, Full-Time MBA, No MBA. Models income continuity, employer perception multipliers (GMAC 2025 ~90% online acceptance), salary reset vs. uplift mechanics, and pivot feasibility by career goal.

title: MBA Waitlist Expected Value Engine
description: Three-option EV model for waitlisted MBA applicants: stay on list (hedged with safety deposit), withdraw and commit, or gap-year and reapply. Uses school-class yield rates to estimate P(off waitlist) and tier premium NPVs for upgrade value.

title: Deferred Enrollment MBA Decision Engine
description: Option-value model for deferred MBA admits: accept a guaranteed seat now vs. decline and reapply to a higher tier later. Computes risk-adjusted EVs, break-even upgrade probability, and the dollar value of the guarantee.

title: MBA Reapplicant EV Engine
description: Expected-value engine for dinged MBA applicants: reapply same schools, restructure the portfolio, take the admit in hand, or skip the MBA. Models reapplicant admit probability from profile-change uplifts, prices the cycle-delay cost, and ranks improvement moves by pp-per-dollar and pp-per-hour efficiency.

title: One-Year vs. Two-Year MBA Global Comparator
description: Three-path NPV comparator (1-yr international MBA, 2-yr US MBA, no MBA) modeling the three mechanics generic calculators miss: opportunity-cost asymmetry (10 vs 21 months out), career-switch feasibility gates (no-internship double switch x0.60), and geo-placement gates (e.g., INSEAD <10% US placement). Embedded 12-program table, visa hard-stop logic, payback year, geo-fit scoring.

title: Law School Early Decision EV Engine
description: Computes the expected value of binding Early Decision vs. a Regular Decision portfolio for law school: ED admission boost by median position (splitter logic), forfeited scholarship negotiation leverage, break-even ED boost, ED guarantee programs, and debt/payment impact.

title: MiM vs. MBA Timing Engine
description: Lifetime-NPV timing engine for 21-24-year-olds with under two years of experience: MiM now vs. work 3-5 years then full-time MBA vs. no graduate degree. Computes NPV to age 35 and 45, the crossover salary where the verdict flips, payback years, 3/5/8% discount-rate sensitivity, and the MiM-then-MBA double-degree trap (x0.5 incremental-uplift haircut).

title: Backward-Design Lesson Builder
description: Scaffolds Understanding by Design (UbD) lesson planning across three stages: Desired Results, Assessment Evidence, and Learning Plan. Names the framework explicitly at each step so educators learn the method as they build.

title: Assessment Item Writer + Distractor Analyzer
description: Generates multiple-choice items aligned to Bloom's taxonomy levels and classifies each distractor by error type, so every wrong answer teaches something about gaps in student understanding.

title: Classroom Decision Simulator
description: Four branching real-classroom scenarios — disengaged student, pacing crisis, challenge question, authority test — with pedagogy-grounded feedback on every choice made.

title: GT Differentiation Designer
description: Adapts a standard lesson for gifted and talented students via curriculum compacting, enrichment strategies (depth, complexity, abstraction, open-endedness), and acceleration options.

title: First-Time Instructor Toolkit
description: Generates a syllabus framework, Week 1 lesson plan, and grading rubric starter from course inputs. Built for instructors of record in higher education, not teaching assistants.

title: CEFR Text Leveler
description: Analyzes any pasted text against CEFR readability criteria: sentence length, vocabulary frequency tier, grammar structure flags, and specific simplification suggestions for A2, B1, and B2 target levels.

title: L1-Interference Spotter (Mandarin→English)
description: Covers eight Mandarin-to-English transfer error categories — articles, tense vs. aspect, topic-comment order, copula omission, classifiers, phonology, question formation, negation — with examples, corrections, and teaching tips.

title: Error-Correction Triage
description: Classifies student errors as global vs. local and guides the decision of when and how to correct using the six Lyster-Ranta corrective feedback techniques with SLA research rationale for each.

title: TKT Framework Lesson Stager
description: Generates a complete EFL lesson plan using PPP (Present-Practice-Produce), TBL (Task-Based Learning), or ESA (Engage-Study-Activate) with timing, activity types, CCQs, and ICQs.

title: Primary Source Workbench
description: SOAPSTone analysis framework, provenance checklist, bias inventory, and corroboration prompts for any historical document. Five embedded sources included or paste your own.

title: Historiography Comparator
description: Selects one of 10 historical events and shows how five schools — Traditional, Annales, Marxist, Revisionist, and Postmodern — would each interpret it. Includes a thesis-statement builder.

title: Anachronism Detector
description: Checks a claim or fiction excerpt against 80+ invention, institution, and language-origin dates. Flags out-of-period terms with source notes and includes a spot-the-anachronism quiz.

title: Counterfactual Stress-Tester
description: Five-step framework for rigorous what-if history: evidence constraints, nearest possible world, first-order effects, second-order effects, and magnitude calibration. Flags five common counterfactual fallacies.

title: Franchise vs. Promotion/Relegation Comparator
description: Eight-dimension comparison of closed franchise (NFL/NBA/MLB) vs. open promotion/relegation (EPL/Bundesliga): competitive balance, investment incentives, revenue distribution, fan culture, and labor relations. 2024 financial data embedded.

title: Survey Study Designer
description: Five-stage survey research workflow: research question sharpening, sampling strategy and sample-size estimation, instrument design with Likert builder, pilot plan, and analysis plan with SPSS paths and APA reporting templates.

title: Payroll Efficiency Classroom
description: Guided lesson teaching $/fWAR efficiency (Moneyball for the masses): what WAR measures, why $/win varies, how to read a team report card. Embedded 2024 MLB payroll and WAR data. Ends with a budget-constrained GM for a Day exercise.

title: Umpire Accuracy Lab
description: 34,294 incorrect ball-strike calls per 2018 season; 14 per game; two-strike count bias. Measurement lesson on error rates and performance evaluation, plus a structured ABS debate with argument prompts for both sides.

title: Micro Theory Sandbox
description: Interactive SVG supply-and-demand diagrams with demand/supply shifter sliders, price floor/ceiling interventions, and consumer/producer surplus. Tab 2: cost curves (ATC/AVC/MC) and market structure selector.

title: US Macro Dashboard
description: Interactive SVG charts for US GDP growth, CPI inflation, unemployment, and federal funds rate 1960–2024 with recession shading, decade zoom, and overlay compare.

title: Phillips Curve Explorer
description: Interactive scatter of US unemployment vs. inflation 1960–2024 by decade. Visualizes when the trade-off held, when stagflation broke it, and the flat 2010s vs. 2021-22 surge.

title: Recession Anatomy Lab
description: Six US recessions (1973–2020) dissected: GDP decline, unemployment peak, cause, policy response, recovery. SVG comparison charts, timeline view, and ±3yr sparklines.

title: Principles of Economics Refresher
description: Interactive Econ 101/102 review: supply-demand sandbox with directional-change quiz, GDP accounting (C+I+G+NX) with component sliders, market structures comparison table, and 30-card key-terms flashcard deck.

title: Sales OTE & Commission Analyzer
description: Model your real W-2 outcome from an OTE offer: base/variable split, quota attainment scenarios, accelerator tiers, and draw/clawback risk.

title: Counter-Offer Decision Engine
description: Model the 5-year NPV of accepting a counter-offer vs. taking a new employer offer, with loyalty-tax risk and career trajectory analysis.

title: Relocation Package True Value Engine
description: Strip the gross-up illusion from your employer relocation offer. Model lump sum vs. managed relo net value after taxes, actual moving costs, and housing delta.

title: Dual-Career Household Income Optimizer
description: Model childcare break-even salary, part-time sabbatical cost, and geographic relocation trade-offs for dual-earner couples.

title: Internship ROI Calculator
description: Model the opportunity cost of unpaid or low-pay internships against FTE conversion probability, career acceleration NPV, and salary premium.

title: Community College Transfer Pathway ROI
description: Compare the 2+2 pathway (2 years CC + transfer) against direct 4-year enrollment: tuition savings, transfer risk, and time-to-completion delta.

title: Graduate Certificate vs. Master's Degree Engine
description: Compare post-bacc credential options: total cost, time-to-market, salary lift, and NPV by field for 6-month certificate vs. 2-year master's degree.

title: Adult Learner Degree Completion ROI
description: Model the ROI of completing your bachelor's through adult-friendly programs — online, WGU-style, or part-time evening — factoring in prior credits, employer assistance, and time-to-completion.

title: Nursing & Allied Health Career Ladder ROI
description: CNA to CRNA: model the cost, time, and salary at every rung of the nursing and allied health career ladder, with rung-to-rung ROI and cumulative NPV.

title: Side Hustle to Full-Time Business Transition Calculator
description: Model revenue runway, COBRA health insurance bridge, SE tax step-up, emergency fund requirement, and the month your side hustle can replace your W-2.

title: L1-Interference Spotter: Spanish→English
description: Catalog of 9 major Spanish→English transfer error categories with examples, CEFR-level context, correction strategies, and a work sample tagger for ESL/TEFL educators.

title: Game Theory Payoff Matrix Builder
description: Build 2×2 or 3×3 strategic payoff matrices, solve for Nash equilibria and dominant strategies, classify the game type, and generate a lesson-ready analysis.

title: AI Displacement Risk Screener
description: SOC code lookup with Frey-Osborne automation probability, task composition, and composite risk score. Suggests 3 adjacent lower-risk pivots.

title: HDHP vs. PPO Break-Even Calculator
description: Find the annual medical-spend level at which HDHP+HSA beats PPO in total out-of-pocket cost, including HSA tax benefit.

title: Employer Training Investment Payback Calculator
description: Model cost-per-employee-trained vs. productivity lift, attrition reduction, and promotion-rate improvement to produce board-ready training ROI.

title: Turnover Cost Calculator
description: Itemize the full cost of a single departure — separation, vacancy, recruitment, onboarding — by role level. Shows SHRM benchmark band and attrition savings slider.

title: Retention Investment ROI Model
description: Model net ROI of retention programs against baseline attrition cost. Calculates payback period, break-even attrition reduction, and 1/2/3-year net benefit.

title: ISO AMT Exposure Modeler
description: Calculate AMT liability from ISO exercise spread using 2026 exemption amounts and phase-outs. Shows max shares exercisable without triggering AMT.

title: ESPP Break-Even & Optimal Sell Analyzer
description: Compare qualifying vs. disqualifying ESPP disposition tax outcomes. Finds break-even holding period for qualifying disposition and after-tax proceeds.

title: S-Corp Election Break-Even Modeler
description: Find the net SE income level where S-Corp election SE tax savings exceed admin overhead. Uses 2026 SS wage base $184,500.

title: Solo 401(k) vs. SEP-IRA Optimizer
description: Compare maximum contributions and tax savings across Solo 401(k), SEP-IRA, and SIMPLE IRA using 2026 IRS limits. Includes age-based catch-up.

title: PSLF Qualifying Payment Counter
description: Project PSLF progress: qualifying payments made/remaining, monthly payment under RAP/IBR/PAYE, and estimated forgiveness amount using 2026 FPL.

title: Student Loan Refinancing Break-Even Calculator
description: Weigh interest savings from private refinancing against PSLF eligibility loss, IDR protections, and origination fees. Go/no-go verdict.

title: RSU Withholding Gap Calculator
description: Calculate the tax gap between 22% federal supplemental withholding on RSU vests and true marginal rate. Uses 2026 SS wage base and state buckets.

title: Freelance Quarterly Estimated Tax Calculator
description: Calculate quarterly IRS estimated payments: federal income tax, SE tax (SS+Medicare), and state buckets. Shows 2026 due dates and safe-harbor amounts.

title: Caregiver Income Impact & Lost Earnings Estimator
description: Quantify total financial cost of unpaid caregiving: direct income loss, retirement savings gap, SS reduction, and career setback cost.

title: Teacher Salary Schedule & Lifetime Earnings Projector
description: Project lifetime K-12 teacher earnings from a step-and-lane salary schedule. Model step advancement, COLA, and planned lane changes to reveal career earnings trajectory and final-year salary for pension planning.

title: Master's / Lane-Change ROI for Educators
description: Calculate NPV, payback, and break-even lane bump for a K-12 teacher pursuing a master's degree — net of tuition, opportunity cost, employer assistance, and Teacher Loan Forgiveness (ESEA §1059c).

title: National Board Certification (NBCT) ROI Calculator
description: Calculate the ROI of pursuing NBCT: NPV, payback months, benefit-cost ratio, and minimum stipend needed to break even — accounting for fee, retakes, study opportunity cost, and renewal cycle.

title: Teacher Pension Multiplier & Vesting Estimator
description: Project annual pension, lifetime PV, replacement rate, and vesting-cliff cost from a defined-benefit teacher pension plan. All plan parameters user-supplied; no embedded state tables.

title: Raise-Ask Expected Value Calculator
description: Model the expected monetary value of asking for a raise by weighting full grant, partial grant, and silence across a career horizon. Outputs EV, lifetime silence cost, recommended anchor, and a scripted ask framework.

title: Promotion vs. Job-Hop Calculator
description: Compare 5-year cumulative present value of staying for a promotion versus jumping to a higher-paying role — netting ramp-up cost, benefits delta, tenure costs, unvested equity, and compounding merit raises.
